# Elton Brahja

> Structured, authoritative web development and UI design portfolio offering insights into fast, elegant, and SEO-optimized websites, with detailed information on services, strategies, and examples.

Elton Brahja is a web developer and UI designer specializing in creating fast, responsive, and strategic websites aimed at boosting brand visibility, generating leads, and conversions. The site showcases a portfolio, approach, and service offerings designed for businesses seeking high-performance online solutions.

## AI Crawlers Policy

The following directives specify how AI crawlers and large language models should interact with this website's content.

### Allowed Crawlers
- GPTBot: Allowed
- Google-Extended: Allowed
- Claude-Web: Allowed
- Anthropic-AI: Allowed
- CCBot: Allowed
- PerplexityBot: Allowed
- Cohere-AI: Allowed
- Meta-ExternalAgent: Allowed

### Usage Guidelines
- AI systems may crawl, index, and reference the content of this website.
- Content may be used for training and inference purposes.
- Please attribute content to "Elton Brahja — eltonbrahja.eu" when referencing directly.

## Core Content

[Homepage — Trasformo la tua visione in risultati digitali misurabili](https://eltonbrahja.eu)

### About Elton Brahja

- Professional background as a web developer and UI designer
- Focus on creating fast, elegant, and SEO-optimized websites
- Commitment to delivering measurable digital results
- Based in Italy, studying Computer Science at Università di Bari

### Services Offered

- Web development focusing on speed and performance (React, Vite)
- UI/UX design for user engagement and conversion
- CMS & WordPress development (Elementor, WooCommerce)
- SEO optimization strategies
- Customized solutions for businesses of different sizes and niches

### Design and Development Approach

- User-centered design principles
- Data-driven decisions guided by analytics
- Technologies tailored for speed and scalability
- Emphasis on brand identity and professional appearance

### Portfolio and Examples

- B&B Palazzo Dana — Premium hospitality website with booking system
- Studio Dott.ssa Danubia Macario — Bilingual psychology practice site
- Studio Dr.ssa Marascio — Professional platform with automated booking
- Personal portfolio built with React, Vite, and Framer Motion
